reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request modifies the regex used to sanitize multi-line notes in the ShortlistDrawer component by adding global and multi-line flags to prevent formula injection. However, the reviewer identified that this change introduces a regression in CSV usability because spreadsheet applications only evaluate formulas based on the first character of a cell. Sanitizing every line results in visible single quotes on subsequent lines, which corrupts the user's data. The reviewer suggested reverting the regex to its original form.

### 💡 Codex Review Here are some automated review suggestions for this pull request. **Reviewed commit:** `f0e2e317e2`

title: 🛡️ Sentinel: [HIGH] Fix CSV Formula Injection in Shortlist Export

reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request optimizes performance in transaction-analysis.ts by replacing O(N log N) sorting and mapping operations with O(N) single-pass loops in summarizeComparables and assessAskingPrice. Feedback suggests further consolidating loops to eliminate intermediate array allocations and removing a redundant length check where the array is already guaranteed to be non-empty.

title: ⚡ Bolt: Replace multiple O(N log N) sorts with O(N) single passes

reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request introduces a lease warning system to provide users with visual cues regarding property lease durations. Key changes include the addition of a LeaseWarningPanel component, a buildLeaseSignals utility for evaluating lease conditions (such as "very short" or "below filter"), and the integration of these signals into the DetailDrawer and ShortlistDrawer components. Additionally, localized strings and comprehensive unit tests for the signal logic have been implemented. I have no feedback to provide as there were no review comments to assess.

reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request introduces a primary school map overlay feature, allowing users to visualize nearby primary schools and their distance bands (within 1km, 2km, or beyond). Key changes include the addition of a `SchoolOverlayControl` component, map layer synchronization via `useMapDataSync`, and new utility functions in `school-proximity.ts` for distance classification and GeoJSON conversion. The feedback suggests extracting hardcoded hex colors and layer IDs in `useMapLayers.ts` into shared constants to improve maintainability and ensure consistency with `useMapDataSync.ts`.

## Code Review

This pull request introduces a data confidence level indicator across the DetailDrawer, ResultsPane, and ShortlistDrawer components, determined by the volume of recent transactions. The implementation includes a new utility module src/lib/confidence.ts with associated unit tests and updated i18n dictionaries for English and Chinese. A review comment identifies a font size inconsistency in the ShortlistDrawer that could impact accessibility and recommends aligning it with other components.

title: Add transaction-count confidence badges for block median and trend views

reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request introduces a transaction outlier detection feature, including a new utility function that identifies high and low price outliers using IQR and median thresholds. The DetailDrawer component is updated to display outlier badges and an explanatory rule, supported by new unit tests and internationalization keys. Review feedback suggests optimizing the detection logic by moving a median validity check outside the loop and improving UI maintainability by replacing hardcoded values in translation strings with dynamic placeholders and conditionally rendering the outlier rule explanation.

reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request introduces a 'Similar Blocks' feature to the DetailDrawer, enabling users to discover and navigate to comparable housing blocks. The implementation includes a new similarity scoring algorithm in `src/lib/similar-blocks.ts` that weights factors such as location, flat type, price, lease commencement, and MRT proximity. Review feedback highlights performance optimization opportunities within the ranking logic, specifically recommending a more efficient Jaccard similarity calculation to reduce memory allocations and replacing `localeCompare` with basic string comparisons to improve sorting speed.

## Code Review

This pull request introduces cloud synchronization for the shortlist feature, allowing users to back up and sync their saved items. It includes a new backend integration layer, updates to the `useShortlist` hook for session management and background syncing, and a new UI component for authentication. Feedback focuses on resolving potential race conditions and stale state issues during the sync process, improving the login user experience with keyboard shortcuts, and optimizing the performance of the shortlist merging logic.

/gemini review

Addressed feedback:
- Hardened security with PBKDF2 password hashing and corrected JWT middleware path matching.
- Optimized shortlist merging to (N)$ and removed redundant sorting in the main App component.
- Cleaned up backend documentation to remove legacy Supabase references.
/gemini review

Addressed all remaining review feedback:
- Fixed a race condition in `signIn` that could overwrite cloud data with local state.
- Separated authentication errors from fatal application errors to prevent lockouts on login failure.
- Hardened backend data integrity with Zod validation and robust JSON parsing for shortlists.
- Tightened CORS configuration and improved client-side error extraction.
/gemini review
@claude review

reviews.body:
## Code Review

This pull request implements cloud synchronization for the shortlist using Supabase, adding authentication UI, a cloud sync utility, and database schema definitions. The review feedback highlights critical improvements: merging local and cloud data during sign-in to prevent data loss, debouncing sync requests to reduce network traffic during frequent updates, and broadening error message extraction to better handle various Supabase API responses.

### 💡 Codex Review Here are some automated review suggestions for this pull request. **Reviewed commit:** `46646accb4`
ℹ️ About Codex in GitHub
[Your team has set up Codex to review pull requests in this repo](https://chatgpt.com/codex/cloud/settings/general). Reviews are triggered when you - Open a pull request for review - Mark a draft as ready - Comment "@codex review". If Codex has suggestions, it will comment; otherwise it will react with 👍. Codex can also answer questions or update the PR. Try commenting "@codex address that feedback".

## Code Review

This pull request introduces a backend scaffold using Cloudflare Workers (Hono) and D1 to enable optional cloud synchronization for saved flats. Key additions include user authentication with auto-signup, JWT-protected endpoints for managing shortlists, and a frontend integration that merges local and cloud data. Feedback focuses on improving security by using stronger password hashing, fixing a middleware path matching bug that would bypass authentication, updating documentation to remove legacy Supabase references, and optimizing CORS and sorting logic.

## Code Review

This pull request introduces a backend scaffold using Cloudflare Workers (Hono) and D1 to support optional cloud synchronization for saved flats. Key additions include a JWT-based authentication system with auto-signup, a database schema for user shortlists, and a frontend UI for managing cloud sync status. The `useShortlist` hook has been updated to handle debounced synchronization and merging of local and cloud data. Feedback focuses on improving the robustness of data handling, specifically recommending Zod validation for database-retrieved JSON and better error handling for API response parsing.

## Code Review

This pull request introduces a backend scaffold using Cloudflare Workers and D1 to enable cloud-based synchronization for the user's saved shortlist. The changes include new API endpoints for authentication and data persistence, along with frontend integration to manage cloud sync sessions. Several security and configuration improvements were identified: the password verification logic should be updated to use a constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks, the CORS origin configuration should be more restrictive, the PBKDF2 iteration count should be increased to meet modern security standards, the wrangler compatibility date should be set to a tested date, the missing migrations directory needs to be created, and the removal of the sorting logic for the shortlist display should be reviewed.

title: Add optional Cloudflare D1 shortlist sync with zero-Supabase persistence
